title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Bajaj Auto

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Production Engineer at Bajaj Auto
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Production Engineer with drive and ambition, Bajaj Auto in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bajaj Auto:
Bajaj Auto is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in Quality Control
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in PLC/SCADA
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in APQP
• Proficiency in SolidWorks

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bajaj Auto!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
